impl-s3-1-global.title: [S3-1] Implement: Global Test Setup Fix
impl-s3-1-global.instruction_raw: Refactor tests/conftest.py to remove global sys.modules poisoning and implement registry teardowns. Follow the 'Hybrid Module Patching' strategy in the spec.

impl-s3-1-scenarios.title: [S3-1] Implement: Scenario Runner Leak Fix
impl-s3-1-scenarios.instruction_raw: Fix test_scenario_runner.py by removing MockRepository cycles and implementing gc_collect_harder(). Ensure sim.finalize_simulation() is called.

impl-s3-1-decisions.title: [S3-1] Implement: Decisions Mocks Refactor
impl-s3-1-decisions.instruction_raw: Refactor tests/unit/decisions/conftest.py to enforce spec=RealClass and implement protocol-based cleanup (ICleanable).

impl-s3-1-corporate.title: [S3-1] Implement: Corporate Mocks Refactor
impl-s3-1-corporate.instruction_raw: Refactor tests/unit/corporate/conftest.py to replace raw dicts with DTOs and enforce protocol fidelity on reflux_system.

impl-s3-1-diagnosis.title: [S3-1] Implement: Scenario Diagnosis Fixtures Fix
impl-s3-1-diagnosis.instruction_raw: Fix tests/integration/scenarios/diagnosis/conftest.py to decouple agent creation from global Simulation state. Update factories as specified.

IMPL-PH35-STABILIZATION-GENESIS.title: [Phase 35] Genesis Protocol & M2 Integrity Implementation
IMPL-PH35-STABILIZATION-GENESIS.instruction_raw: Implement the 'Sacred Sequence' for initialization and the new M2/SystemDebt calculation logic. Ensure all genesis transfers are tagged with `TransactionMetadataDTO(is_genesis=True)`. Refer to the spec for details.

IMPL-PH35-STABILIZATION-FIRM.title: [Phase 35] Atomic Firm Factory Implementation
IMPL-PH35-STABILIZATION-FIRM.instruction_raw: Implement the atomic `FirmFactory` providing registration, account opening, and capitalization in a single workflow. Prevent 'Ghost Firms' (TD-LIFECYCLE-GHOST-FIRM). Refer to the spec for details.

IMPL-PH35-STABILIZATION-SAGA.title: [Phase 35] Saga Caretaker Implementation
IMPL-PH35-STABILIZATION-SAGA.instruction_raw: Implement the `SagaCaretaker` to sweep and purge orphaned sagas holding stale references to dead agents. Enforce ISagaRepository/ISagaOrchestrator segregation. Refer to the spec for details.
